interaction_phrase: partnering to contribute world-class materials science and superconductivity expertise
occurrence_sentence: Northwestern University, Ames Laboratory, Fermilab, Rigetti Computing, the National Institute of Standards and Technology, the Italian National Institute for Nuclear Physics and several universities are partnering to contribute world-class materials science and superconductivity expertise to target sources of decoherence.

interaction_phrase: further the energy, economic and national security interests of the United States
occurrence_sentence: "By partnering with world-class experts, our work will translate ground-breaking science into scalable superconducting quantum computing systems and commercialize capabilities that will further the energy, economic and national security interests of the United States," said Rigetti Computing CEO Chad Rigetti.

interaction_phrase: successfully collaborating with Fermilab for more than 40 years
occurrence_sentence: "The Italian National Institute for Nuclear Physics has been successfully collaborating with Fermilab for more than 40 years and is excited to be a member of the extraordinary SQMS team," said INFN President Antonio Zoccoli.
source_actor: Italian National Institute for Nuclear Physics
